metadata.description: Code in, importable API collections out — for every API testing tool. By aks-builds.

plugins.name: reqweave
plugins.description: Statically read a service codebase (ASP.NET Core REST today) and generate ready-to-import collections for Postman, OpenAPI, Insomnia, Bruno, Hoppscotch, Thunder Client, and .http — with exhaustive request variants per endpoint (happy path, boundaries, invalid input, per-status, auth). Deterministic, secret-safe, no network.
